name: Web Compliance Conformance Demo
summary: The runnable proof that the Web Compliance gate is conformant. The runtime (the #437 gate runner, #438 waivers, #439 audit mapping) is relocated to Frontier UI (#1814, WE holds zero executable); its conformance runs through the plateau-hosted conformance runner (#1788/#1790) driving the WE-owned webcompliance vector suite (#1809: policy + measured signals → gate verdict + waiver effects) against the FUI binding. The pass/fail panel is rendered at plateau-origin inside a cross-origin iframe.
description:
Concept

The runnable proof that the Web Compliance gate is conformant. The runtime — the #437 gate runner (runGate), the #438 waiver machinery (applyWaivers), and the #439 audit mapping — is relocated to Frontier UI (#1814; WE holds zero executable, #1282). Its conformance runs through the plateau-hosted conformance runner (#1788 / #1790), driving the WE webcompliance vector suite (#1809) against the FUI binding.

Verified contract

WE owns only the build-agnostic vectors and the CompliancePolicy meta-schema (#436); the engine impl is FUI's, the runner is plateau's. The pass/fail panel is rendered at plateau-origin inside an iframe — the cross-origin boundary (#1788 ratified (b)) reaching the shared, neutral runner with no implementer→runner edge. A green result proves conformance independent of how the gate is built (#899).
